next_step_text: 50% Confidence 6th Jun- Good meeting with Joseph Ortega (head of Procurement reporting to Jerry (VP Proc). Is looking to present Zycus internally to management as Ariba renewals are approaching) ck need to get back in from of Jerry and Anton asap to consolidate Zycus mindshare- Planning a F2F with Anton, Jerry, Rogelisa and Joseph asap 16th Mar - Sent intro mail and meeting request. 5th Jan- Hand

buyer_dependent_items.text: Share the outcome of Joseph Ortega's internal presentation of Zycus to Globe management
Confirm the revised RFP / evaluation timeline for the 2026 cycle

competitive_position.summary: SAP Ariba (incumbent) is the single strongest current threat: contract extended 3 months and renewals approaching per 6 Jun 2026, so the dominant risk is a do-nothing renewal, not a rival platform. Coupa ran a workshop before Zycus (31 Jul 2024) but shows no recent buyer lean and ranks below the incumbent. iValua is named only in the field with no corroborating evidence and is dormant. Zycus was indicated to be leading in 2024 (Rogeliza, 16 Sep 2024) with the AI/Merlin story and the GCash reference as the wedge.

competitors.name: SAP Ariba
competitors.quote: Ariba contract extended 3 months (22 Aug 2024); Ariba renewals are approaching and Joseph is presenting Zycus internally as the alternative (6 Jun 2026).
competitors.source: SF Next_Step__c 22 Aug 2024 + 6 Jun 2026, SF Competitors__c
competitors.how_we_win: Make the switching-cost and Ariba-renewal-avoidance case concrete and land agentic AI/Merlin as the capability the incumbent cannot match before renewal locks.

competitors.name: Coupa
competitors.quote: Jerry wants a workshop, Coupa has done already (31 Jul 2024).
competitors.how_we_win: Differentiate on S2P suite depth plus Merlin AI and the GCash reference; no recent Coupa momentum to counter.

competitors.name: iValua
competitors.quote: Named in Competitors__c field only; no mention in Next Step history or activities.
competitors.how_we_win: Monitor only; surface fit and reference proof if it re-enters the evaluation.

champion_strength.source: OpportunityContactRole; SF Next_Step__c 16 Sep 2024, 13 Feb, 6 Jun 2026; SF activities 13 Apr / 29 May / 2 Jun 2026
champion_strength.summary: Rogeliza Rana (Head Of Sourcing) is a strong, active champion who indicated Zycus was leading in 2024 and brokered a CFO intro; Joseph Ortega (PAA Head) has developed into a second active advocate presenting Zycus internally as Ariba renewals near. Both are procurement-side with no budget authority, so the sponsorship is not yet at the executive level needed to close.
champion_strength.champion: Rogeliza Rana (Head Of Sourcing), Joseph Ortega (PaL - Process, Automation and Analytics Head)

meddpicc_economic_buyer.narrative: The economic buyer is mapped but not engaged. Rizza Eala (CFO) is a named Salesforce contact with role Decision Maker and was met on 31 Jul 2024 alongside Ernest and Jerry Cabiles, but has had no logged engagement in the ~23 months since. Management turnover (new CEO/CFO/CIO settled 22 Aug 2024) repeatedly reset the budget conversation, and Next Step notes reference reaching out to a CFO (Carlo Puno) for F2F on 6 Jun without confirmation. Budget authority for 2026 is unconfirmed (19 Jun 2024: Jerry reviewing multiple project costings to prioritise capex). Re-opening the CFO via Rogeliza's warm intro is the ranked move.

recommended_moves: Lock the planned F2F with Jerry, Rogeliza, Joseph and Anton in Manila.
Ask Rogeliza for the revised RFP and evaluation timeline in writing.
Build a quantified switching-cost case against the SAP Ariba renewal with Joseph.
